docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-04-2025 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APR-09-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE CHRISTOPHER CHANDLER. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ELIANA BAGADIONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RODNEY LEE IS PRESENT. CASE TO BE HEARD CONCURRENTLY WITH CSM-25-869337. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $75.00 SERVED JAN-28-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, RODNEY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-09-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-09-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ELIANA BAGADIONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RODNEY LEE IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-09-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAGADIONG, ELIANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, RODNEY $8,127.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,277.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, RODNEY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY BAGADIONG, ELIANA AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, RODNEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
